text: I am surrounded by the sterile brilliance of glass and technology, stepping into a space devoted to research and development. The air hums with the potential of creative endeavor, as if each wall and display vibrates with invention yet to be born. I feel both small and inspired—a witness to human curiosity and industry. The anticipation of what might be discovered creates a buoyant energy within me, inviting contemplation, participation, and a sense of wonder at the ongoing dance between knowledge and possibility.
